backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that manages booking form submissions with CRUD operations (submit, getAll, delete) using a Map store, and includes preupgrade/postupgrade hooks to clean and reinitialize state across canister upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the admin panel hash-based routing fix was implemented in frontend/src/App.tsx, with high confidence and linked to test REQ-31.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference document for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property tokens for both light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, border, chart, and sidebar color variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the SPA with the page title set to Jigar Chaudhary's brand, Google Fonts preconnect links for Bebas Neue and Inter, and a root div with the main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that implements hash-based routing to detect the /admin path (via window.location.hash and pathname) and renders either the AdminPanel or the full public site with all section components.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section component displaying Jigar's bio, a classroom photo with an orange gradient border, achievement counters (130+ sessions, 5000+ youth, 5+ programs), and scroll-triggered fade-in animations via a custom FadeIn wrapper.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard component that fetches, displays, and deletes booking submissions using React Query hooks, filtering out placeholder entries and formatting ICP nanosecond timestamps for display.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: A contact/booking section with a form (name, email, phone, event type, message) that submits via a React Query mutation, plus social links and WhatsApp button.
frontend/src/components/Corporate.tsx: A section showcasing Jigar's corporate workshop offerings, listing five workshop topics with icons and a CTA button that scrolls to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/CounterAnimation: A reusable animated counter component that counts up to a target number with an ease-out cubic animation when the element scrolls into view.
frontend/src/components/CTABanner.tsx: A full-width call-to-action banner section with animated entrance, prompting users to book Jigar via a contact form scroll or WhatsApp link.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying the brand name, quick navigation links, and social media icons (Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube) with smooth-scroll navigation support.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: The hero section with a large headline, animated entrance, stat counters, CTA buttons, and a split layout with text on the left and an image on the right.
frontend/src/components/Lightbox.tsx: A modal image lightbox component that locks body scroll, supports Escape key to close, and closes on backdrop click while displaying a full-size image.
frontend/src/components/MediaCertificati: Renders a photo gallery section with 24 workshop images, supporting lazy-load scroll animations via useInView and a Lightbox component for full-image viewing.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware background, smooth-scroll anchor links, a 'Book Now' CTA, and a full-screen mobile menu with hamburger toggle.
frontend/src/components/Programs.tsx: Displays five program cards (REVIVE, Master Your Circle, etc.) with icons, descriptions, and 'Register Now' buttons that scroll to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx: Renders a 2-column grid of four testimonial cards with star ratings, quote icons, and scroll-triggered fade-in animations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useInView.ts: Custom hook wrapping IntersectionObserver to return a ref and a boolean indicating whether the element is in the viewport, with configurable threshold, rootMargin, and once options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching all booking submissions, submitting a new booking, and deleting a submission via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives, defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the dark theme, and adds utility classes for orange gradient text, glow effects, and typography using Bebas Neue and Inter fonts.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication wrapping the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH-based semantic color tokens, brand colors (dark, orange, gold), custom fonts (Bebas Neue, Inter), box shadows with orange/gold glows, and keyframe animations for accordion, pulse, and float effects.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 13) describing the premium personal brand React SPA for Jigar Chaudhary, documenting architectural decisions, existing features, known issues (frontend-only contact form, hash-based admin routing), and contact/social link details.
